relevance_notes: Companion Bain 2026 outlook article with direct commentary on deal recovery, fundraising conditions, exits, and value creation expectations.

relevance_notes: Bain and StepStone GP survey on 2026 operating conditions; useful for fundraising friction, fee pressure, liquidity, and AI adoption context.

relevance_notes: McKinsey's flagship private markets review; useful for AUM growth, strategy mix shifts, democratization, and public/private convergence context.

title: Asset management 2025: The great convergence
relevance_notes: Directly relevant to VDA distribution questions; covers wealth-channel expansion, evergreen and semi-liquid vehicles, secondaries, operating leverage, and convergence across asset-management models.

relevance_notes: BCG summary of its 2025 global asset management report; useful for revenue pool, margin, operating model, and industry inflection framing.

title: Capturing Wealth Management's $3 Trillion Private Market Opportunity
relevance_notes: BCG wealth channel context source focused on private market distribution, advisor enablement, and addressable opportunity in wealth management.

title: Asset Managers Pivot to Private Markets: Casey Quirk Results
relevance_notes: Category: strategy-consulting. Casey Quirk survey on asset managers shifting toward private markets; useful for manager economics, product mix, and business-model direction.

relevance_notes: Category: strategy-consulting. Useful for GP stakes, private capital structure, retailization, and strategic capital formation themes.

title: Insights on capturing the retail alternatives market
relevance_notes: Category: strategy-consulting. Focused on wealth channel expansion, retail alternatives product design, and go-to-market considerations.

title: Private Markets in Motion
relevance_notes: Category: market-intelligence. Private markets allocation and strategy context from an institutional-investor advisory perspective.

relevance_notes: Category: market-intelligence. Directly relevant to private wealth distribution, advisor adoption, and product fit in alternatives.

relevance_notes: Category: market-intelligence. Specialist wealth-management research on advisor demand, client retention, and asset-gathering implications for private markets.

title: Competing For Growth
relevance_notes: Category: strategy-consulting. Older but still relevant framing on growth strategy in wealth and asset management, including product and channel implications.
